response.step_by_step_log: I analyzed the video to identify any vocal music. I found that the background music is instrumental throughout and there is no singing involved in the background track, nor does the VTuber perform any songs. I then divided the video into scenes based on the merchandise items discussed by Roboco-san. As no vocal music was detected, the song-related fields in the JSON are set to null.
response.global_summary: The video features the VTuber Roboco-san introducing various merchandise items for her 2025 birthday celebration, including a commemorative plate, a glass, an 'osuwari' (sitting) plushie, situation voice packs, and a card set for the Hololive Official Card Game. The entire segment is accompanied by instrumental background music, with no vocal songs played.

scenes.description: Roboco-san introduces the commemorative plate merchandise.
Roboco-san introduces the commemorative glass merchandise.
Roboco-san introduces the situation voice packs merchandise.
Roboco-san introduces the full birthday set and the Hololive Official Card Game card set merchandise.
